title: Manage catalogs
excerpt: description: Understand how to manage Iceberg REST catalogs associated with R2 buckets image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. * Enable and disable [R2 Data Catalog](https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/data-catalog/) on your buckets. * Enable and disable [table maintenance](https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/data-catalog/table-maintenance/) features like compaction and snapshot expiration.
